title: Preserve deterministic extraction and financial integrity
description: Qualified adapters must produce repeatable ordered source outcomes and exact reconciliation without unexplained records or floating-point arithmetic.
target: 100% of repeated previews for every qualified fixture produce semantically identical ordered outcomes; 100% of source records are accounted for; every available opening, closing, and running-balance control reconciles exactly in integer minor units; zero unexplained transaction-bearing records are eligible for approval.
load_condition: Every supported fixture, every adapter-version compatibility fixture, and generated boundary cases for dates, signs, zero movement, duplicate tuples, and control mismatches.
measurement: Golden-fixture replay, independent normalization digests, exact minor-unit reconciliation assertions, mutation-negative tests, and property-based boundary tests in CI.
rationale: Silent extraction drift would corrupt every downstream budget and insight while still looking plausible.
